creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
# pkg_delete snmptt-1.3
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/etc/snmp'
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package `snmptt-1.3'
(perhaps the packing list is incorrectly specified?)


3. Well, it shouldn't try to delete whole '/usr/local/etc/snmp'
directory because at least net-snmp stores its configs there. So,
pkg-plist has to be fixed.
